mapper.select: SELECT A.HO_TY_NO , A.APT_CMPLEX_NO , A.TY_NM , A.EXCLUSIVE_SIZE , A.ROOM_CNT , A.BATHROOM_CNT , A.IMAGE_FILE_NO , F.GOOGLE_ID FROM APT_HO_TY A LEFT JOIN ATTACH_FILE F ON A.IMAGE_FILE_NO = F.FILE_GROUP_NO AND F.FILE_SORT_ORDER = 0 WHERE A.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} ORDER BY A.TY_NM

SELECT H.HO_TY_NO , H.APT_CMPLEX_NO , H.TY_NM , H.EXCLUSIVE_SIZE , H.ROOM_CNT , H.BATHROOM_CNT , H.IMAGE_FILE_NO , F.GOOGLE_ID
FROM APT_HO_TY H
LEFT JOIN ATTACH_FILE F ON H.IMAGE_FILE_NO = F.FILE_GROUP_NO AND F.FILE_SORT_ORDER = 0
WHERE H.HO_TY_NO = #{hoTyNo}

SELECT DONG_NO || '동 ' || HO || '호'
FROM APT_DETAIL
WHERE HO_TY_NO = #{hoTyNo}
ORDER BY DONG_NO, HO
